sourceMovie.title: Eternity
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Eternity (2025) stuck because it commits to its romance premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. David Freyne's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The romance and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Great Expectations
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Eternity clicked for you, Great Expectations (1998) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Eternity?
faq.answer: Try Great Expectations, People We Meet on Vacation, What Women Want—each shares DNA with Eternity while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Eternity?
faq.answer: Eternity (2025) is best described as Romance, Comedy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Eternity worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
